name: @stewra/runner
description: Stewra Runner — a headless companion process that runs on the user's OWN machine (a laptop, or a cloud VM they own). It hosts coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) via ACP and runs them against the user's repositories; Stewra's servers only route and observe.

scripts.test:esm-interop: node --input-type=module -e "import { RUNNER_CLIENT_EVENTS } from '@stewra/shared-types'; if (!RUNNER_CLIENT_EVENTS?.HELLO) { throw new Error('ESM named-export interop is broken'); }"
